landing.title: German,
landing.subtitle: An independent platform, built in Cameroon. From A1 to C1 — AI conversation, live correction, CEFR-aligned path.
landing.featuresSubtitle: From speaking practice to visa prep — all in one place.
landing.levelsSubtitle: Original CEFR-aligned content covering all key communicative competencies from A1 to C1.
landing.centerDesc: One dashboard for your entire school. Manage teachers, students, and classes — with real-time analytics and Mobile Money billing built in.
landing.faq1Q: How does the speaking practice work?
landing.faq1A: You have a live conversation with your AI coach. Choose a scenario (studies, work, travel…), answer in German, and receive a detailed score on grammar, vocabulary, and relevance after each exchange.
landing.faq2Q: Is the free plan actually free?
landing.faq2A: Yes — completely free. No credit card required. You get full access to A1 with 3 lessons per day and 3 simulator sessions per month.
landing.faq3Q: Are German language certificates recognized for visas?
landing.faq3A: Official German language exams are recognized worldwide for visa applications. Yema Languages provides independent CEFR-aligned practice to help you reach each level from A1 to C1. Yema is not affiliated with any official examination institute.
landing.faq4Q: Can I join a teacher's class?
landing.faq4A: Absolutely. Enter your teacher's class code when you sign up or from your dashboard. Your teacher approves your enrollment.
landing.faq5A: The platform works great on mobile (iOS and Android) through your browser. A native app is on the roadmap.
landing.faq6Q: How do I become a partner center?
landing.faq6A: Reach out on WhatsApp. We offer 30 days free to try the center solution with your team — no commitment.
landing.ctaFinalDesc: No credit card. No commitment. Full access to A1 — right now.
landing.ctaFinalSocial: No credit card · Free A1 access · CEFR A1→C1
landing.ctaFinalCities: Available across Cameroon and Central Africa
landing.simDesc: Your AI coach guides you through realistic scenarios — studies, work, travel, daily life in Germany. Every answer is scored on grammar, vocabulary, and relevance.
landing.feature1Desc: Converse with your AI coach in realistic scenarios. Every response is scored on grammar, vocabulary, and relevance in real time.
landing.feature2Desc: Authentic German voices. Dialogues adapted to each level A1→C1.
landing.feature3Desc: Speak German out loud and get instant AI feedback on your pronunciation and fluency.
landing.feature4Desc: Write in German and receive detailed corrections on grammar, vocabulary, and style — powered by Gemini.
landing.feature5Desc: Every quiz adapts to your level automatically. The better you get, the sharper the challenge.
landing.feature6Desc: Join a teacher's class or start your own study group. Everyone's progress is tracked in real time.
landing.feature7Desc: A complete management platform for language schools — teachers, students, classes, and analytics in one place.
landing.feature8Desc: Track your progress on 5 skills: Lesen, Hören, Sprechen, Schreiben, Grammatik.
landing.testimonial1Text: Six months in, I passed my B1. The speaking practice completely changed my confidence in German.
landing.testimonial2Text: My students progress twice as fast with the AI tools. The automatic feedback saves me hours every week.
landing.testimonial3Text: 150 students, one dashboard. The analytics are exactly what we needed to track progress at scale.
landing.simMsg1: Guten Tag. Wir üben heute zusammen Deutsch.
landing.simMsg2: Hello, I would like to start practicing.
landing.simMsg3: Erzählen Sie mir bitte von Ihrem Studienplan.

centerLanding.heroSubtitle: Manage teachers, students, assignments and payments from one platform. With AI speaking practice and advanced analytics.
centerLanding.featuresSubtitle: A complete suite designed for Cameroonian language institutes
centerLanding.feat1Desc: Full dashboard per student: XP, progress, quiz scores, embassy simulator history. Instantly identify struggling students.
centerLanding.feat2Desc: Your AI coach trains students to speak German in realistic scenarios. Grammar, vocabulary and relevance scores each session.
centerLanding.feat3Desc: Subscriptions and course fees collected via MTN Mobile Money and Orange Money. No bank account needed. Full transaction history.
centerLanding.feat4Desc: D-30/60/90 retention rates, teacher rankings, A1→C1 progress, CSV export. Make data-driven decisions.
centerLanding.feat5Desc: Create as many classes as needed. Unique access codes, assignment management, online corrections, chat with students.
centerLanding.feat6Desc: English and French interface, content centered on Cameroonian culture, prices in FCFA, connection optimized for local networks.
centerLanding.pricingSubtitle: No hidden fees. Monthly payment by Mobile Money.
centerLanding.testimonial1Quote: Since Yema, we've reduced our administration time by 60%. Our students progress twice as fast with the AI speaking practice. Oral confidence among our learners has improved dramatically.
centerLanding.testimonial2Quote: Mobile Money billing was a game-changer. Our students now pay from their phone in 2 minutes. We increased our renewal rate by 40%.
centerLanding.testimonial3Quote: The analytics are impressive. I see in real time which students are struggling and intervene before they drop out. Our 90-day retention went from 38% to 64%.
centerLanding.faq1Q: How do I migrate my existing data?
centerLanding.faq1A: Our team assists with a free migration of your student data from Excel, Google Sheets or any other system in under 48h.
centerLanding.faq2A: Yes, we use official MTN MoMo and Orange Money APIs with end-to-end encryption. All transactions are logged and auditable.
centerLanding.faq3A: Absolutely. The Starter plan is free for the first month with all Pro features included. No credit card required.
centerLanding.faq4A: Yes, every account includes 2h of online training and access to our knowledge base. The Enterprise plan includes on-site training.
centerLanding.contactSubtitle: Our team will call you back within 24h for a personalized demonstration.
centerLanding.contactFree: First month free · No credit card required
centerLanding.contactSuccessDesc: Our team will contact you within 24 business hours. In the meantime, you can create your account for free.
